scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.deploy:hosting:render: pnpm run build:web:render && npx firebase-tools@latest deploy --only hosting --project ace-digital-os
scripts.deploy:production: pnpm run build:web:render && pnpm run build:api && npx firebase-tools@latest deploy --only hosting,functions --project ace-digital-os
scripts.deploy:firebase: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:api && npx firebase-tools@latest deploy --project ace-digital-os
scripts.deploy:render:docs: echo 'Connect repo at https://dashboard.render.com — see docs/DEPLOY_RENDER.md'
